name: UNITED GUARDIAN INC
summary: United-Guardian, Inc. operates through its Guardian Laboratories division, manufacturing and marketing specialty cosmetic ingredients, personal care ingredients, sexual wellness ingredients, medical lubricants, and pharmaceutical products. Key products include the Lubrajel line of hydrogel formulations and Renacidin, an FDA-approved urological prescription drug. Products are sold globally through distributors including Ashland Specialty Ingredients and Brenntag Specialties, primarily to cosmetic manufacturers, medical device companies, and pharmaceutical wholesalers.
